test.query: SELECT entropy(SearchEngineID) FROM (SELECT SearchEngineID FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 30000000) settings max_threads = 1
SELECT entropy(MobilePhoneModel) FROM (SELECT MobilePhoneModel FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 30000000)
SELECT entropy(URL) FROM (SELECT URL FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 5000000)
SELECT entropy(URLHash) FROM (SELECT URLHash FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 5000000)
SELECT entropy(URL, URLHash) FROM (SELECT URL, URLHash FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 5000000)
SELECT entropy(RegionID) FROM (SELECT RegionID FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 30000000) settings max_threads = 1
